parts.description:
The interactive area of the slider. Handles pointer presses and drags on the
track, mapping pointer position to a value and moving the closest thumb.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

Visualises the portion of the track between the slider's minimum (or the first
thumb in a range) and the active value.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

Groups all parts of the slider and owns its state, value-change logic and
thumb registration. A single directive drives both orientations — there are no
separate horizontal/vertical components.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

inputs.name: defaultValue
inputs.description: The uncontrolled value of the slider when it is initially rendered.

inputs.name: dir
inputs.description: The reading direction. Mirrors the horizontal axis when set to `'rtl'`.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: When `true`, the user cannot interact with the slider.

inputs.name: form
inputs.description: Id of the form the slider belongs to.

inputs.name: format
inputs.description: Options forwarded to `Intl.NumberFormat` when displaying and announcing values.

inputs.name: largeStep
inputs.description: The granularity with which the value changes on Page Up / Page Down keys and Shift + Arrow keys.

inputs.name: locale
inputs.description: Locale used for value formatting.

inputs.name: max
inputs.description: The maximum value of the slider.

inputs.name: min
inputs.description: The minimum value of the slider.

inputs.name: minStepsBetweenValues
inputs.description: The minimum number of steps that must separate two thumbs in a range slider.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: Name of the native range input rendered by each thumb, for form submission.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: The orientation of the slider.

inputs.name: step
inputs.description: The granularity with which the value can change through user interaction.

inputs.name: thumbAlignment
inputs.description:
How the thumbs align with the control when the value is at min/max.
`center` aligns the thumb center to the control edge; `edge`/`edge-client-only`
inset thumbs so their outer edge aligns to the control edge.

inputs.name: thumbCollisionBehavior
inputs.description: How thumbs behave when they meet in a range slider.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The controlled value of the slider. Use with `(onValueChange)` or two-way `[(value)]`.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending controls publish neither `data-valid` nor `data-invalid`.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Whether the control has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; set on blur/focus-out.

outputs.name: onValueChange
outputs.description: Emitted when the value changes (during interaction).

outputs.name: onValueCommitted
outputs.description: Emitted when interaction ends, with the final value — useful for committing to a backend.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits when the control is touched, notifying Signal Forms (stable Angular 22 contract).

parts.description:
The native `input[type=range]` nested inside a thumb. It is visually hidden but
remains the focusable element that drives keyboard interaction, accessibility
and form submission.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

A draggable handle. Render one per value; place an `input[rdxSliderThumbInput]`
inside it for keyboard, accessibility and form submission.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

inputs.name: index
inputs.description: Explicit index for this thumb (required for SSR range sliders).

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Disables this individual thumb.

parts.description:
The track of the slider — the positioning context for the indicator and thumbs.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

Displays the slider's current value(s) as formatted text. Renders into an
`output` element; the displayed value honours the root `format` and `locale`.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/slider

inputs.name: separator
inputs.description: The separator placed between values of a range slider.
